meta.title: Normalization of Deviance in 3 Minutes
meta.description:
I like fresh content at S4. Rarely do I see a session at an event and say I need to put that on the S4 stage. Marco (Marc) Ayala's Normalization of Deviance at OTCEP in Singapore was a rare exception. I went up to Marco right after he got off stage to ask him for S4x24. Important message, well delivered. Here it is in 3 minutes.

We need to be asking ourselves, periodically and certainly in big shifts if this is a normalization of deviance that will come back to bite us? Have we just moved to another outer ring in the spiral? #s4xevents #otsecurity
